scripts.build: pnpm run build:packages && pnpm run audit:ci && pnpm sync:components && pnpm run export:audit-data && pnpm --filter brickslab_catalog build
scripts.build:packages: pnpm --filter @brickslab./token-contract build && pnpm --filter @brickslab./theme-default build && pnpm --filter @brickslab./ui-web build
